steps.t: Théodred's men have formed a camp in sight of the lake in Tâl Methedras. You should go there to begin planning the rescue of the Grey Company.
Théodred is waiting to speak with you at his forward encampment, in Tâl Methedras.
Théodred is at the forward encampment in Tâl Methedras. You have completed the necessary preparations and are now ready to attempt the rescue of the G…
